name: Ukufakwa kweNasopharyngeal Airway (NPA).
description: Ukufakwa kwesengezo somzila womoya wamakhala oguqukayo ukuze kugcinwe amandla omoya esigulini esiqulekile noma esingazi lutho.
steps: Khetha usayizi we-NPA ofanele (linganisa ukusuka ekhaleni kuye endlebeni).
Gcoba i-NPA ngesandla esivulekile nge-lubricant encibilika emanzini noma ngosawoti.
Faka iphinikhodi yokuphepha nge-flange uma ingekho kakade (ivimbela ukulangazelela).
Faka ngobumnene ekhaleni elingakwesokudla (i-bevel ibheke ku-septum), uye phambili ngokuhambisana nolwanga.
Hamba kuze kube yilapho i-flange ihlezi ngokumelene nekhala.
Beka kabusha isiguli (indawo yokululama uma kungekho ukukhathazeka komgogodla) bese uhlola kabusha indlela yokuphefumula.
Uma ukumelana kuhlangatshezwana nayo, zama ikhala lesobunxele.
warnings: Kunqatshelwe ekuqhekekeni kogebhezi lwe-basilar okusolakala ukuthi (amehlo e-raccoon, uphawu lweMpi, i-CSF rhinorrhea).
I-NPA iyindlela yokuqala yokuphefumula ehamba phambili yesiguli equlekile -- I-OPA ingabangela ukuhlanza ezigulini ezingezwa lutho.
